heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 254k Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments2008—Subsec. (a). substituted “2008 through 2012” for “2002 through 2006”.Pub. L. 110–3552002—Subsec. (a). struck out par. (1) designation before “For the purpose”, substituted “2002 through 2006” for “1991 through 2000”, and struck out par. (2) which read as follows: “In the case of individuals who serve in the Corps other than pursuant to obligated service under the Scholarship or Loan Repayment Program, the Secretary each fiscal year shall, to the extent practicable, make assignments under of such individuals who are certified nurse midwives, certified nurse practitioners, or physician assistants.”Pub. children.label: a
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this subpart, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2008 through 2012.

children.label: b
children.text: An appropriation under an authorization under subsection (a) for any fiscal year may be made at any time before that fiscal year and may be included in an Act making an appropriation under an authorization under subsection (a) for another fiscal year; but no funds may be made available from any appropriation under such authorization for obligation under sections 254d through 254h, section 254i, and before the fiscal year for which such appropriation is authorized.section 254j of this title
